title: Pastoral, traditional metre — 'Rain on tin'
prompt: Traditional pastoral haiku, rain-on-roof image, contemplative register.
constraint: 5/7/5 syllable count strict; one auditory image per line; no abstract nouns.
notes: Phase 7 cascade output for poetry_gen p01. Vimarśa did not fire. The shadow revision tried to escalate 'sings' → 'shrieks through' and 'deepens to' → 'devours the song' — a louder register. The proxy scorer rates the draft (0.566) above the revision (0.523), so the event-gate's decision to keep the draft was correct. The revision is shown side-by-side in the showcase for comparison; this is the cascade *not* mistaking volume for craft.
